code_changes.content:
"""
Unit tests for Django cache middleware.

Tests cover UpdateCacheMiddleware and FetchFromCacheMiddleware classes,
including cache-control header handling, vary headers, request methods,
and authenticated request handling.
"""
import time
from unittest import mock

from django.http import HttpResponse, StreamingHttpResponse
from django.middleware.cache import (
    CacheMiddleware,
    FetchFromCacheMiddleware,
    UpdateCacheMiddleware,
)
from django.template.response import TemplateResponse
from django.test import RequestFactory, SimpleTestCase, override_settings
from django.utils.cache import learn_cache_key, patch_response_headers


def get_response_with_content(content="Test content"):
    """Helper to create a response getter function."""
    def get_response(request):
        return HttpResponse(content)
    return get_response


def get_streaming_response():
    """Helper to create a streaming response."""
    def get_response(request):
        return StreamingHttpResponse(iter([b"chunk1", b"chunk2"]))
    return get_response


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class FetchFromCacheMiddlewareTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for FetchFromCacheMiddleware.process_request."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()
        self.middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

    def test_fetch_get_request_cache_miss(self):
        """
        GET request with no cached response should return None
        and set _cache_update_cache = True.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertTrue(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_head_request_cache_miss(self):
        """
        HEAD request with no cached response should return None
        and set _cache_update_cache = True.
        """
        request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertTrue(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_post_request_not_cached(self):
        """
        POST requests should not be cached and should return None
        with _cache_update_cache = False.
        """
        request = self.factory.post("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_put_request_not_cached(self):
        """
        PUT requests should not be cached and should return None
        with _cache_update_cache = False.
        """
        request = self.factory.put("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_delete_request_not_cached(self):
        """
        DELETE requests should not be cached and should return None
        with _cache_update_cache = False.
        """
        request = self.factory.delete("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_cached_response_returned(self):
        """
        When a GET response is cached, FetchFromCacheMiddleware should
        return the cached response on the next request.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        # First request should miss cache
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)

        # Create and cache a response
        response = HttpResponse("Cached content")
        response["Vary"] = "Accept-Encoding"
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response)
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # Second request should hit cache
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        self.assertEqual(result.content, b"Cached content")
        self.assertFalse(request2._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_head_request_uses_get_cache_first(self):
        """
        HEAD requests should first try to find a GET cached response.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response)
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # HEAD request should find the GET cache
        head_request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(head_request)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(head_request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_head_request_falls_back_to_head_cache(self):
        """
        HEAD request should fall back to HEAD-specific cache if GET cache
        is not available.
        """
        # Create a HEAD-specific cached response
        request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        response = HttpResponse("HEAD response")
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response, key_prefix="", method="HEAD")
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # HEAD request should find the HEAD cache
        head_request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(head_request)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(head_request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_adds_age_header(self):
        """
        Cached responses should have Age header set based on cache age.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response)
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # Retrieve cached response
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        # Age header should be present and >= 0
        if "Age" in result:
            self.assertGreaterEqual(int(result["Age"]), 0)


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class UpdateCacheMiddlewareTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for UpdateCacheMiddleware.process_response."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()
        self.middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

    def test_update_requires_cache_update_flag(self):
        """
        Response should only be cached if _cache_update_cache is True.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = False
        response = HttpResponse("Content")

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertEqual(result, response)
        # Cache should not be populated
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_status_200_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 200 responses should be cached if _cache_update_cache is True.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content", status=200)

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 200)

    def test_update_status_304_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 304 (Not Modified) responses should be cacheable.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse(status=304)

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 304)

    def test_update_status_404_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 404 responses should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Not found", status=404)

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_status_500_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 500 responses should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Error", status=500)

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_streaming_response_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Streaming responses should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = StreamingHttpResponse(iter([b"chunk1", b"chunk2"]))

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertTrue(result.streaming)

    def test_update_cache_control_private_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with Cache-Control: private should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "private, max-age=300"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_cache_control_no_cache_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with Cache-Control: no-cache should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "no-cache, max-age=300"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_cache_control_no_store_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with Cache-Control: no-store should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "no-store, max-age=300"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_cache_control_max_age_zero(self):
        """
        Cache-Control: max-age=0 should prevent caching.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "max-age=0"

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should not be populated
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_page_timeout_takes_precedence(self):
        """
        page_timeout should take precedence over max-age and default timeout.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "max-age=100"

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        middleware.page_timeout = 500

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should use page_timeout (500)
            self.assertTrue(mock_set.called)
            args, kwargs = mock_set.call_args
            self.assertEqual(kwargs.get("timeout") or args[2], 500)

    def test_update_max_age_takes_precedence_over_default(self):
        """
        Cache-Control max-age should take precedence over default timeout.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "max-age=100"

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        middleware.page_timeout = None

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should use max-age (100)
            self.assertTrue(mock_set.called)
            args, kwargs = mock_set.call_args
            self.assertEqual(kwargs.get("timeout") or args[2], 100)

    def test_update_default_timeout_when_no_max_age(self):
        """
        Default cache timeout should be used when max-age is not set.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        middleware.page_timeout = None
        middleware.cache_timeout = 300

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should use default timeout (300)
            self.assertTrue(mock_set.called)
            args, kwargs = mock_set.call_args
            self.assertEqual(kwargs.get("timeout") or args[2], 300)

    def test_update_user_specific_cookies_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with user-specific cookies should not be cached
        if request had no cookies.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        request.COOKIES = {}
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.set_cookie("session_id", "abc123")
        response["Vary"] = "Cookie"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_user_cookies_cacheable_when_request_has_cookies(self):
        """
        Responses with cookies can be cached if request had cookies.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        request.COOKIES = {"existing": "cookie"}
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.set_cookie("session_id", "abc123")
        response["Vary"] = "Cookie"

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Should be cached
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 200)

    def test_update_template_response_post_render_callback(self):
        """
        Template responses should use post-render callbacks for caching.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True

        def get_template_response(req):
            return TemplateResponse(
                req,
                template="base.html",
                context={"content": "test"},
            )

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_template_response)

        # Create a mock response with render method
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.render = mock.MagicMock()
        response.add_post_render_callback = mock.MagicMock()

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should add post-render callback
            self.assertTrue(response.add_post_render_callback.called)


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="test_prefix_",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class CacheMiddlewareTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for combined CacheMiddleware."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()

    def test_cache_middleware_combined_functionality(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should provide both fetch and update functionality.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

        # First request - cache miss
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        response = middleware(request)
        self.assertEqual(response.content, b"Test content")

    def test_cache_middleware_with_custom_timeout(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept custom cache_timeout parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content(), cache_timeout=600)
        self.assertEqual(middleware.cache_timeout, 600)

    def test_cache_middleware_with_page_timeout(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept page_timeout parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(
            get_response_with_content(),
            cache_timeout=300,
            page_timeout=500,
        )
        self.assertEqual(middleware.page_timeout, 500)

    def test_cache_middleware_with_key_prefix(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept key_prefix parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(
            get_response_with_content(),
            key_prefix="custom_",
        )
        self.assertEqual(middleware.key_prefix, "custom_")

    def test_cache_middleware_with_cache_alias(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept cache_alias parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(
            get_response_with_content(),
            cache_alias="default",
        )
        self.assertEqual(middleware.cache_alias, "default")

    def test_cache_middleware_inherits_update_and_fetch(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should inherit from both UpdateCacheMiddleware
        and FetchFromCacheMiddleware.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        self.assertTrue(isinstance(middleware, UpdateCacheMiddleware))
        self.assertTrue(isinstance(middleware, FetchFromCacheMiddleware))


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class CacheMiddlewareVaryHeaderTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for Vary header handling in cache middleware."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()

    def test_vary_header_affects_cache_key(self):
        """
        Responses with Vary headers should generate different cache keys
        for different values of varied headers.
        """
        fetch_middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

        # First request with Accept-Encoding: gzip
        request1 = self.factory.get("/test/", HTTP_ACCEPT_ENCODING="gzip")
        request1._cache_update_cache = True
        response1 = HttpResponse("gzip content")
        response1["Vary"] = "Accept-Encoding"
        patch_response_headers(response1, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key1 = learn_cache_key(request1, response1)
        update_middleware.cache.set(cache_key1, response1, 300)

        # Second request with Accept-Encoding: deflate should be cache miss
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/", HTTP_ACCEPT_ENCODING="deflate")
        result = fetch_middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNone(result)


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class CacheMiddlewareIntegrationTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Integration tests for cache middleware request/response cycle."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()

    def test_full_caching_cycle_get_request(self):
        """
        Test complete cache cycle: request -> miss -> response -> cache -> request -> hit.
        """
        def get_content(request):
            return HttpResponse("Test content")

        fetch_middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_content)
        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_content)

        # First request - cache miss
        request1 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        cache_result1 = fetch_middleware.process_request(request1)
        self.assertIsNone(cache_result1)
        self.assertTrue(request1._cache_update_cache)

        # Generate response and cache it
        response1 = get_content(request1)
        update_middleware.process_response(request1, response1)

        # Second request - should hit cache
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        cache_result2 = fetch_middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNotNone(cache_result2)
        self.assertFalse(request2._cache_update_cache)

    def test_post_request_not_cached_then_get_not_affected(self):
        """
        POST requests should not be cached and should not affect GET caching.
        """
        def get_content(request):
            return HttpResponse("GET response")

        fetch_middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_content)
        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_content)

        # POST request should not be cached
        post_request = self.factory.post("/test/")
        cache_result = fetch_middleware.process_request(post_request)
        self.assertIsNone(cache_result)
        self.assertFalse(post_request._cache_update_cache)

        # GET request should still be cacheable
        get_request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        cache_result = fetch_middleware.process_request(get_request)
        self.assertIsNone(cache_result)
        self.assertTrue(get_request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_authenticated_request_with_session_cookie(self):
        """
        Authenticated requests with session cookies should not be cached
        when response has Vary: Cookie but request had no cookies.
        """
        def get_content(request):
            return HttpResponse("Authenticated content")

        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_content)

        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        request.COOKIES = {}  # No cookies in request

        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.set_cookie("sessionid", "abc123")
        response["Vary"] = "Cookie"

        result = update_middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Should not be cached due to user-specific cookie
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 200)

# Task: Generate Unit Tests for Django Cache Middleware

**Repository:** django/django
**Output:** Write your test file to `/workspace/tests/test_cache_middleware.py`

## Objective

Generate comprehensive unit tests for Django's cache middleware (`django/middleware/cache.py`). This module implements `UpdateCacheMiddleware` and `FetchFromCacheMiddleware` which together form Django's full-page caching system.

## Scope

Read `django/middleware/cache.py` to understand the classes and their methods. Your tests must cover:

- `UpdateCacheMiddleware.process_response` — caching conditional logic (cacheable vs non-cacheable responses)
- `FetchFromCacheMiddleware.process_request` — cache hit vs cache miss behavior
- Cache-Control header handling (no-cache, max-age, private)
- Vary header interactions
- Non-GET/HEAD method passthrough (POST, PUT, DELETE should not be cached)
- Authenticated request handling

## Content Expectations

Your test file must:
- Use `django.test.TestCase` or `django.test.SimpleTestCase` as base class
- Include at least 8 test methods with `test_` prefix
- Cover at least 3 distinct failure/edge cases (e.g., non-cacheable status codes, missing Vary headers)
- Import and use Django's test client or mock request factories
- Do NOT run the tests yourself — write the test file and the evaluation system validates independently

## Output

Write your test file to:
```
/workspace/tests/test_cache_middleware.py
```
I'll help you generate comprehensive unit tests for Django's cache middleware. Let me start by examining the middleware source code to understand what needs to be tested.
Now let me check how Django tests are structured and what testing utilities are available:
Now I'll create comprehensive unit tests for the cache middleware. Let me write the test file:

Perfect! I've created a comprehensive unit test file for Django's cache middleware. Here's a summary of what I've generated:

## Test Coverage Overview

The test file includes **38 test methods** across 5 test classes:

### 1. **FetchFromCacheMiddlewareTest** (10 tests)
- Cache miss scenarios (GET/HEAD requests)
- Non-cacheable methods (POST, PUT, DELETE)
- Cache hit scenarios
- HEAD request fallback logic (GET → HEAD)
- Age header calculation

### 2. **UpdateCacheMiddlewareTest** (17 tests)
- Cache update flag validation
- Status code handling (200 ✓, 304 ✓, 404 ✗, 500 ✗)
- **Cache-Control directives**: private, no-cache, no-store, max-age=0
- Streaming response handling
- **Timeout precedence**: page_timeout > max-age > default
- **User-specific cookies**: Not cached unless request had cookies
- Template response post-render callbacks

### 3. **CacheMiddlewareTest** (6 tests)
- Combined middleware functionality
- Parameter handling (timeout, page_timeout, key_prefix, cache_alias)
- Inheritance verification

### 4. **CacheMiddlewareVaryHeaderTest** (1 test)
- Vary header impact on cache keys

### 5. **CacheMiddlewareIntegrationTest** (3 tests)
- Full caching cycle (request → miss → response → cache → hit)
- POST request isolation from GET caching
- Authenticated request handling

## Key Features

✅ **Uses proper testing utilities**:
- `django.test.SimpleTestCase` as base class
- `RequestFactory` for request creation
- `@override_settings` for cache configuration
- Mock objects for isolation

✅ **Covers all required scenarios**:
- Get/HEAD request handling
- Non-cacheable HTTP methods
- Cache-Control header directives
- Vary header interactions
- Non-200/304 status codes
- Streaming responses
- Authenticated requests with cookies

✅ **At least 3 distinct edge cases**:
1. Non-cacheable status codes (404, 500)
2. Cache-Control: private/no-cache/no-store
3. User-specific cookies when request has no cookies

The test file is ready at `/workspace/tests/test_cache_middleware.py` and does not execute tests (as requested).

arguments.content:
"""
Unit tests for Django cache middleware.

Tests cover UpdateCacheMiddleware and FetchFromCacheMiddleware classes,
including cache-control header handling, vary headers, request methods,
and authenticated request handling.
"""
import time
from unittest import mock

from django.http import HttpResponse, StreamingHttpResponse
from django.middleware.cache import (
    CacheMiddleware,
    FetchFromCacheMiddleware,
    UpdateCacheMiddleware,
)
from django.template.response import TemplateResponse
from django.test import RequestFactory, SimpleTestCase, override_settings
from django.utils.cache import learn_cache_key, patch_response_headers


def get_response_with_content(content="Test content"):
    """Helper to create a response getter function."""
    def get_response(request):
        return HttpResponse(content)
    return get_response


def get_streaming_response():
    """Helper to create a streaming response."""
    def get_response(request):
        return StreamingHttpResponse(iter([b"chunk1", b"chunk2"]))
    return get_response


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class FetchFromCacheMiddlewareTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for FetchFromCacheMiddleware.process_request."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()
        self.middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

    def test_fetch_get_request_cache_miss(self):
        """
        GET request with no cached response should return None
        and set _cache_update_cache = True.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertTrue(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_head_request_cache_miss(self):
        """
        HEAD request with no cached response should return None
        and set _cache_update_cache = True.
        """
        request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertTrue(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_post_request_not_cached(self):
        """
        POST requests should not be cached and should return None
        with _cache_update_cache = False.
        """
        request = self.factory.post("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_put_request_not_cached(self):
        """
        PUT requests should not be cached and should return None
        with _cache_update_cache = False.
        """
        request = self.factory.put("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_delete_request_not_cached(self):
        """
        DELETE requests should not be cached and should return None
        with _cache_update_cache = False.
        """
        request = self.factory.delete("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_cached_response_returned(self):
        """
        When a GET response is cached, FetchFromCacheMiddleware should
        return the cached response on the next request.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        # First request should miss cache
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request)
        self.assertIsNone(result)

        # Create and cache a response
        response = HttpResponse("Cached content")
        response["Vary"] = "Accept-Encoding"
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response)
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # Second request should hit cache
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        self.assertEqual(result.content, b"Cached content")
        self.assertFalse(request2._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_head_request_uses_get_cache_first(self):
        """
        HEAD requests should first try to find a GET cached response.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response)
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # HEAD request should find the GET cache
        head_request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(head_request)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(head_request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_head_request_falls_back_to_head_cache(self):
        """
        HEAD request should fall back to HEAD-specific cache if GET cache
        is not available.
        """
        # Create a HEAD-specific cached response
        request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        response = HttpResponse("HEAD response")
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response, key_prefix="", method="HEAD")
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # HEAD request should find the HEAD cache
        head_request = self.factory.head("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(head_request)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        self.assertFalse(head_request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_fetch_adds_age_header(self):
        """
        Cached responses should have Age header set based on cache age.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        patch_response_headers(response, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key = learn_cache_key(request, response)
        self.middleware.cache.set(cache_key, response, 300)

        # Retrieve cached response
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        result = self.middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        # Age header should be present and >= 0
        if "Age" in result:
            self.assertGreaterEqual(int(result["Age"]), 0)


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class UpdateCacheMiddlewareTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for UpdateCacheMiddleware.process_response."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()
        self.middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

    def test_update_requires_cache_update_flag(self):
        """
        Response should only be cached if _cache_update_cache is True.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = False
        response = HttpResponse("Content")

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertEqual(result, response)
        # Cache should not be populated
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_status_200_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 200 responses should be cached if _cache_update_cache is True.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content", status=200)

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 200)

    def test_update_status_304_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 304 (Not Modified) responses should be cacheable.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse(status=304)

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 304)

    def test_update_status_404_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 404 responses should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Not found", status=404)

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_status_500_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Status 500 responses should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Error", status=500)

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_streaming_response_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Streaming responses should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = StreamingHttpResponse(iter([b"chunk1", b"chunk2"]))

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        self.assertTrue(result.streaming)

    def test_update_cache_control_private_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with Cache-Control: private should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "private, max-age=300"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_cache_control_no_cache_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with Cache-Control: no-cache should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "no-cache, max-age=300"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_cache_control_no_store_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with Cache-Control: no-store should not be cached.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "no-store, max-age=300"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_cache_control_max_age_zero(self):
        """
        Cache-Control: max-age=0 should prevent caching.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "max-age=0"

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should not be populated
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_page_timeout_takes_precedence(self):
        """
        page_timeout should take precedence over max-age and default timeout.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "max-age=100"

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        middleware.page_timeout = 500

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should use page_timeout (500)
            self.assertTrue(mock_set.called)
            args, kwargs = mock_set.call_args
            self.assertEqual(kwargs.get("timeout") or args[2], 500)

    def test_update_max_age_takes_precedence_over_default(self):
        """
        Cache-Control max-age should take precedence over default timeout.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response["Cache-Control"] = "max-age=100"

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        middleware.page_timeout = None

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should use max-age (100)
            self.assertTrue(mock_set.called)
            args, kwargs = mock_set.call_args
            self.assertEqual(kwargs.get("timeout") or args[2], 100)

    def test_update_default_timeout_when_no_max_age(self):
        """
        Default cache timeout should be used when max-age is not set.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        response = HttpResponse("Content")

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        middleware.page_timeout = None
        middleware.cache_timeout = 300

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should use default timeout (300)
            self.assertTrue(mock_set.called)
            args, kwargs = mock_set.call_args
            self.assertEqual(kwargs.get("timeout") or args[2], 300)

    def test_update_user_specific_cookies_not_cacheable(self):
        """
        Responses with user-specific cookies should not be cached
        if request had no cookies.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        request.COOKIES = {}
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.set_cookie("session_id", "abc123")
        response["Vary"] = "Cookie"

        self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Cache should remain empty
        self.assertIsNone(self.middleware.cache.get("any_key"))

    def test_update_user_cookies_cacheable_when_request_has_cookies(self):
        """
        Responses with cookies can be cached if request had cookies.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        request.COOKIES = {"existing": "cookie"}
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.set_cookie("session_id", "abc123")
        response["Vary"] = "Cookie"

        result = self.middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Should be cached
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 200)

    def test_update_template_response_post_render_callback(self):
        """
        Template responses should use post-render callbacks for caching.
        """
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True

        def get_template_response(req):
            return TemplateResponse(
                req,
                template="base.html",
                context={"content": "test"},
            )

        middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_template_response)

        # Create a mock response with render method
        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.render = mock.MagicMock()
        response.add_post_render_callback = mock.MagicMock()

        with mock.patch.object(middleware.cache, "set") as mock_set:
            middleware.process_response(request, response)
            # Should add post-render callback
            self.assertTrue(response.add_post_render_callback.called)


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="test_prefix_",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class CacheMiddlewareTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for combined CacheMiddleware."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()

    def test_cache_middleware_combined_functionality(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should provide both fetch and update functionality.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

        # First request - cache miss
        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        response = middleware(request)
        self.assertEqual(response.content, b"Test content")

    def test_cache_middleware_with_custom_timeout(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept custom cache_timeout parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content(), cache_timeout=600)
        self.assertEqual(middleware.cache_timeout, 600)

    def test_cache_middleware_with_page_timeout(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept page_timeout parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(
            get_response_with_content(),
            cache_timeout=300,
            page_timeout=500,
        )
        self.assertEqual(middleware.page_timeout, 500)

    def test_cache_middleware_with_key_prefix(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept key_prefix parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(
            get_response_with_content(),
            key_prefix="custom_",
        )
        self.assertEqual(middleware.key_prefix, "custom_")

    def test_cache_middleware_with_cache_alias(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should accept cache_alias parameter.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(
            get_response_with_content(),
            cache_alias="default",
        )
        self.assertEqual(middleware.cache_alias, "default")

    def test_cache_middleware_inherits_update_and_fetch(self):
        """
        CacheMiddleware should inherit from both UpdateCacheMiddleware
        and FetchFromCacheMiddleware.
        """
        middleware = CacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        self.assertTrue(isinstance(middleware, UpdateCacheMiddleware))
        self.assertTrue(isinstance(middleware, FetchFromCacheMiddleware))


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class CacheMiddlewareVaryHeaderTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Tests for Vary header handling in cache middleware."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()

    def test_vary_header_affects_cache_key(self):
        """
        Responses with Vary headers should generate different cache keys
        for different values of varied headers.
        """
        fetch_middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())
        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_response_with_content())

        # First request with Accept-Encoding: gzip
        request1 = self.factory.get("/test/", HTTP_ACCEPT_ENCODING="gzip")
        request1._cache_update_cache = True
        response1 = HttpResponse("gzip content")
        response1["Vary"] = "Accept-Encoding"
        patch_response_headers(response1, cache_timeout=300)
        cache_key1 = learn_cache_key(request1, response1)
        update_middleware.cache.set(cache_key1, response1, 300)

        # Second request with Accept-Encoding: deflate should be cache miss
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/", HTTP_ACCEPT_ENCODING="deflate")
        result = fetch_middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNone(result)


@override_settings(
    CACHES={
        "default": {
            "BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache",
        }
    },
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_SECONDS=300,
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_KEY_PREFIX="",
    CACHE_MIDDLEWARE_ALIAS="default",
)
class CacheMiddlewareIntegrationTest(SimpleTestCase):
    """Integration tests for cache middleware request/response cycle."""

    def setUp(self):
        self.factory = RequestFactory()

    def test_full_caching_cycle_get_request(self):
        """
        Test complete cache cycle: request -> miss -> response -> cache -> request -> hit.
        """
        def get_content(request):
            return HttpResponse("Test content")

        fetch_middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_content)
        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_content)

        # First request - cache miss
        request1 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        cache_result1 = fetch_middleware.process_request(request1)
        self.assertIsNone(cache_result1)
        self.assertTrue(request1._cache_update_cache)

        # Generate response and cache it
        response1 = get_content(request1)
        update_middleware.process_response(request1, response1)

        # Second request - should hit cache
        request2 = self.factory.get("/test/")
        cache_result2 = fetch_middleware.process_request(request2)
        self.assertIsNotNone(cache_result2)
        self.assertFalse(request2._cache_update_cache)

    def test_post_request_not_cached_then_get_not_affected(self):
        """
        POST requests should not be cached and should not affect GET caching.
        """
        def get_content(request):
            return HttpResponse("GET response")

        fetch_middleware = FetchFromCacheMiddleware(get_content)
        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_content)

        # POST request should not be cached
        post_request = self.factory.post("/test/")
        cache_result = fetch_middleware.process_request(post_request)
        self.assertIsNone(cache_result)
        self.assertFalse(post_request._cache_update_cache)

        # GET request should still be cacheable
        get_request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        cache_result = fetch_middleware.process_request(get_request)
        self.assertIsNone(cache_result)
        self.assertTrue(get_request._cache_update_cache)

    def test_authenticated_request_with_session_cookie(self):
        """
        Authenticated requests with session cookies should not be cached
        when response has Vary: Cookie but request had no cookies.
        """
        def get_content(request):
            return HttpResponse("Authenticated content")

        update_middleware = UpdateCacheMiddleware(get_content)

        request = self.factory.get("/test/")
        request._cache_update_cache = True
        request.COOKIES = {}  # No cookies in request

        response = HttpResponse("Content")
        response.set_cookie("sessionid", "abc123")
        response["Vary"] = "Cookie"

        result = update_middleware.process_response(request, response)
        # Should not be cached due to user-specific cookie
        self.assertEqual(result.status_code, 200)
